snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | Katy Perry
💿 Canción | The One That Got Away
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 27/12/2022
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"The One That Got Away" de Katy Perry es una historia nostálgica sobre ese amor que marcó tu vida pero que, por decisiones o circunstancias, se perdió para siempre. La canción mezcla recuerdos juveniles con arrepentimiento, mostrando cómo incluso con éxito y dinero, hay cosas —como el tiempo y las personas— que no se pueden recuperar.

📲 Sígue a "Katy Perry" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/katyperry/
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@KatyPerry

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

snippet.description:
Title : SENG ADA KABAR
Artist : Justy Aldrin & Hendri Tallane
Written by : Justy Aldrin & Hendri Talane
Prod by PAM
Directed by BelgyApriliandy 
Edited by Belgy Apriliandy
Executive Prod. Eriska April 

Support by VIBE INDONESIA and Brutal Collection

Dangke banya Tuhan Yesus , Istri tercinta Eriska dan anak2 terkasih Jane dan Raisa , dan keluarga yang selalu support beta dalam keadaan apapun ,  dangke banya buat semua orang yang terlibat dalam lagu ini khususnya buat beta pung ade HENDRI TALLANE yang sangat terbaik kalo tulis lirik , dan untuk pasukan jogja keluarga besar BRUTAL COLLECTION Kaka Toton , Kaka Jac Zeran, Kaka Rise One , Om Aje , Kaka Moche , Ade Fezz , Epet , Muel . 
Semoga lagu ini bisa sampai ke hati setiap pendengar . 

SENG ADA KABAR

Su lama seng ada kabar 
Nona ale dimana
Lama seng dengar suara

Su lama seng bakudapa
Nona skarang se deng sapa
Ada bae bae ka disana

Su jauh .. tapele
Orang laeng su ambe
Su jauh .. tapele
Biar mo bilang apa lai nona cuma se sandiri

Su coba ulang kali beta tahan rasa biar tong seng pisah
Muka mo taruh dimana kalo orang tau katong su sama sama
Sio sampe jua tuang hati e
Jujur bt masih paleng sayang se paleng sayang

Luka kanapa pigi tanpa alasan
Badai deng ombak masa seng bisa lawan
Se putar bale kastinggal samua par jadi kenangan

Badan ni jatuh malele
Rasa seng bisa parlente
Beta masih tunggu kabar dari ale

👉 Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an Merupakan Kumpulan Lagu Lawas Tahun 1980an Asal Indonesia. Lagu-lagu Ini Bukan Sekadar Musik Tetapi Juga Karya Seni Yang Membawa Pendengarnya Kembali Ke Momen-momen Indah Dan Berkesan Di Masa Lalu. Pada Masa Itulah Musik Indonesia Mengalami Perkembangan Yang Pesat Dengan Berbagai Genre Dan Gaya, Mulai Dari Pop, Rock, Hingga Dangdut Dan Balada.
👉 Pengantar Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an:Lagu Ini Merupakan Salah Satu Lagu Balada Yang Sangat Terkenal Dengan Kandungan Yang Mendalam Tentang Cinta Dan Kesakitan.
Nike Ardilla Menjadi Ikon Pop Indonesia Dengan Lagu Ini. Melodi Yang Lembut Dan Lirik Yang Emosional Telah Menyentuh Hati Banyak Orang.
👉 Lirik Yang Penuh Makna: Lirik Sering Kali Menceritakan Tentang Cinta, Kehidupan, Dan Pengalaman Pribadi, Dengan Mudah Menyentuh Hati Pendengarnya.

👉Kenangan Indah: Lagu-lagu Ini Mengingatkan Kembali Kenangan Indah Dan Momen Tak Terlupakan Pendengarnya Di Masa Mudanya.
Pengaruh Artis: 

👉 Banyak Lagu-lagu Yang Dibawakan Oleh Artis-artis Legendaris Yang Mempunyai Pengaruh Besar Dalam Musik Indonesia 
Dan Meninggalkan Bekas Yang Mendalam Di Hati Para Penggemarnya.

👉 Jika Kamu Pecinta Musik Dan Ingin Mengenang Kembali Momen Indah Tahun 80-an, Lagu Lawas || Indonesia Tahun 80an Pasti Akan Menghadirkan Momen Kenikmatan Musik Yang Menyenangkan Dan Penuh Nostalgia. Dengarkan Dan Biarkan Musik Membawa Anda Kembali Ke Kenangan Indah Masa Lalu.

snippet.title: The Script - The Man Who Can't Be Moved (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👉The Script - The Man Who Can't Be Moved (Lyrics)

🎵 Follow the official Golden Network playlist on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/78TFbUcZBZ8a70kFHK1et9?si=cb29aee6e1ec4cc0

🔔 Hit the Subscribe Button and Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎤 Song Lyrics : The Script - The Man Who Can't Be Moved (Lyrics)

Lyrics : 

[Verse 1]
Going back to the corner where I first saw you
Gonna camp in my sleeping bag, I'm not gonna move
Got some words on cardboard, got your picture in my hand
Saying, "If you see this girl, can you tell her where I am?"
Some try to hand me money, they don't understand
I'm not broke, I'm just a broken-hearted man
I know it makes no sense, what else can I do?
And how can I move on when I'm still in love with you?

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street
So I'm not moving
I'm not moving

[Verse 2]
Policeman says, "Son, you can't stay here"
I say, "There's someone I'm waiting for
If it's a day, a month, a year"
Gotta stand my ground, even if it rains or snows
If she changes her mind, this is the first place she will go

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street
So I'm not moving
I'm not moving
I'm not moving
I'm not moving

[Bridge]
People talk about the guy who's waiting on a girl, oh
There are no holes in his shoes, but a big hole in his world, mmm
Maybe I'll get famous as the man who can't be moved
And maybe you won't mean to, but you'll see me on the news
And you'll come running to the corner 'cause you know it's just for you
I'm the man who can't be moved
I'm the man who can't be moved

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me (Find you're missing me)
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be (Oh, where on Earth I could be)
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet (To the place that we'd meet, oh, oh)
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street (On the corner of the street)
So I'm not moving

[Chorus]
'Cause if one day you wake up, and find that you're missing me (I'm not moving)
And your heart starts to wonder where on this Earth I could be (I'm not moving)
Thinking maybe you'll come back here to the place that we'd meet (I'm not moving)
And you'll see me waiting for you, on the corner of the street

[Outro]
Going back to the corner
Where I first saw you
Gonna camp in my sleeping bag
I'm not gonna move

I always, always, I always will

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox
